owner_operator_stated: The website at the exact matching address/phone identifies Dr. Sanjeet Parmar, DDS as the dentist/owner. There is no mention anywhere on the site of Gerald Wine or Daniel Lassman, the doctors named in this record's entity 'Gerald L Wine DDS and Daniel L Lassman DDS LTD'.
notes: SUCCESSOR: record entity 'Gerald L Wine DDS and Daniel L Lassman DDS LTD' matches this address (2632 W Division St) and exact phone (773-235-0980), but the current live website for that address/phone (branded 'Division Dental Practitioners' / 'Division Dental Clinic') names only Dr. Sanjeet Parmar, DDS as owner/dentist, with no reference to Wine or Lassman -- indicating a sale, retirement, or rebrand. Stale third-party directories (Yahoo Local, npidb) still list Wine/Lassman under the old NPI record.

owner_operator_stated: Jason Korkus, DDS is listed as Founder of Sonrisa Family Dental, the multi-location group that operates this 'Perla' location matching this record's address and phone.
notes: Corroborated by exact address (3948 W 26th St) and exact phone (773-521-1190) match on the practice's own 'Perla' location page. Operates as 'Sonrisa Family Dental' brand under founder Dr. Jason Korkus, part of a 12-location Chicago-area dental group (potential DSO-style group ownership). A careers page exists site-wide but lists no specific current job openings -- only a generic downloadable application form (fax/email submission), so no roles counted as active openings.

owner_operator_stated: Multiple independent directories (Vitals, NPI database, Yelp, Wellness.com) show this record's named entity, 'Ami G Vaidya DMD SC' (Dr. Girishkumar B. Vaidya, DDS), operating at 3900 W Madison St Suite 12 with phone (773) 533-4323 -- a different phone than this record's (773) 533-3838. That phone number, at the same street address but Suite 14, is instead associated with a different practice, 'Paramasivam Family Dentist Center' (Dr. Palaniswamy Paramasivam, DDS), per Yelp/Yellowpages/Groupon/dentistoffices.com listings.
notes: This record's phone number (773-533-3838) appears to belong to a different suite/practice in the same building (Paramasivam Family Dentist Center, Suite 14) rather than to the named entity Ami G Vaidya DMD SC (Suite 12, phone 773-533-4323). The vendor-hinted domain paramasivamfamilydentistcenter.com is dead (connection refused) and no working official website was found for Vaidya's practice either, so no site could be corroborated for either entity.

Vendor hint domain (brushfamilydent.com) now redirects/belongs to 'Rose Family Dentistry' at 5100 N Western Ave with phone (872) 302-4977 -- a different address and phone than this record (5214 N Western Ave Ste 303, 773-907-1878), so rejected per corroboration rule. A similarly-named site, suburbanfamilydentalpllc.com, belongs to an unrelated practice in New York (716 area code). No dedicated website could be found for 'Suburban Family Dental Center, Inc.' at 5214 N Western Ave; only a third-party WebMD directory listing confirms the address/phone, which is not sufficient corroboration of an owned website.

public_practice_name: Moskin Dental Associates (Kimberly Chan, DDS) - Lincoln Square
owner_operator_stated: The practice's own contact page states the Lincoln Square office at 5131 N Lincoln Avenue is reachable at 773-432-4605 (appointments) or 773-271-5596 (general inquiries) -- the latter is an exact match to this record's phone number -- and names Dr. Kimberly Chan, DDS as the practicing dentist. This record's named entity, 'Farkas Dental', is not mentioned on this site.
notes: SUCCESSOR: this record names 'Farkas Dental' at 5131 N Lincoln Ave / (773) 271-5596, but that exact address and phone are corroborated on moskindentalassociates.com's own contact page as 'Moskin Dental Associates' (Dr. Kimberly Chan, DDS). Farkas Dental itself (per WebMD, denTEL, Yelp) now operates a few doors down at 5321 N Lincoln Ave with a different phone (773-310-4883), plus a second location in Evanston -- consistent with a practice relocation/successor rather than closure. Moskin Dental Associates has an active third-party job-board posting for a Part-Time Dental Hygienist ($52-65/hr) as of this research; no careers link was found on moskindentalassociates.com itself.

Vendor hint domain (compassdentalcare.com) belongs to a different practice, 'Compass Dental at Lincoln Square', in the same building but a different suite (2334 W Lawrence Ave #215, phone 773-561-6747) -- it does not match this record's suite/phone (#208, 773-271-6168), so rejected per corroboration rule. Third-party directories (Yelp, opennpi, CareCredit, Healthgrades) consistently confirm 'DiMario Dental Services' (Dr. Veronica DiMario, DDS) at 2334 W Lawrence Ave #208 with the matching phone, but no dedicated official website for the practice could be found or corroborated.
